messages.content: Hi there, can you please help with my performance review: PERFORMANCE ELEMENTS -I take pride in my work and value doing my job to the best of my ability. I always deliver reports/projects in an accurate and timely manner. I am comfortable working independently to meet company goals as well as collaboratively as part of team.	-- please help revise

Performance Elements: 
I consistently prioritize excellence in my work and strive to perform my job to the highest standards. I consistently deliver reports and complete projects accurately and within the designated timeframes. I am equally adept at working independently to achieve company objectives, as well as collaborating effectively with my colleagues as a valuable team member.

Communication -Communication is a key. I always communicate with others in a respectful manner.		              I frequently share relevant information and updates with my supervisors and coworkers so that our team as a whole can benefit and stay on track and informed.

Communication - I recognize the importance of effective communication and consistently engage with others in a respectful manner. I proactively share relevant information and provide regular updates to both my supervisors and coworkers. This ensures that our team operates cohesively and remains well-informed, thereby maximizing our collective success.

Interpersonal Skills -I always put customers/clients requires on the first. I built cross-functional relationships and take initiative to drive results.  Treat people with respect; keep commitment and work with integrity and ethnically. A great team player.

Interpersonal Skills - I prioritize the needs of customers/clients and consistently strive to provide exceptional service. I actively cultivate cross-functional relationships and demonstrate initiative in driving results. I consistently treat others with respect and professionalism, and I maintain a high level of commitment and integrity in my work. I am highly collaborative and consistently contribute to the success of the team.
Attendance -I am a reliable and trustworthy person. I keep an excellent attendance record.

Attendance - I am recognized as a reliable and dependable team member. I consistently maintain an excellent attendance record, ensuring that I am present and ready to contribute to the team's success. My colleagues and supervisors can trust that I will be present and engaged in my responsibilities, which further enhances the overall effectiveness and productivity of our team.
Safety Compliance -I always follow the company safety compliance procedures.

Safety Compliance - I consistently adhere to and follow all company safety compliance procedures. I recognize the critical importance of maintaining a safe work environment for myself and others. By diligently following safety protocols, I contribute to the overall well-being and welfare of everyone in the workplace.

Knowledge / Skills -Mastery of core accounting areas (GL/monthly financial close for multiple entities; AR/AP/ Fixed Assets depreciation/Payroll process; Audit/Tax/ Government reports/ Union Reports; establishing and enforcing proper accounting polices and procedures. 					
Additionally, proving the critical thinking and value-added insights to financial analysis and overall business profitability and growth, i.e., Job Schedule, Job Profitability Analysis.

Knowledge / Skills - I have demonstrated mastery in various core accounting areas, including but not limited to general ledger maintenance and monthly financial closing for multiple entities, managing accounts receivable/payable, fixed assets depreciation, payroll processing, as well as handling audit, tax, government, and union reports. I excel at establishing and enforcing effective accounting policies and procedures, ensuring accuracy and compliance. 

In addition, I possess strong critical thinking skills and consistently provide value-added insights in financial analysis. I actively contribute to overall business profitability and growth through tasks such as job scheduling and profitability analysis. My proficiency in these areas enhances the organization's ability to make informed decisions and achieve sustainable success.

SUMMARY		
I joined company for 2 years. I learned our company business with multiple entities. I have 20 years accounting experience, extensive knowledge of US GAAP. Ability to think strategically, built cross-functional relationships and take initiative to drive results, strong organizational and time management skills. Passionate about improvement.

Summary:

During my two years with the company, I have gained a deep understanding of our business operations, including our multiple entities. With 20 years of accounting experience and extensive knowledge of US GAAP, I bring a high level of expertise to my role. I possess the ability to think strategically, fostering cross-functional relationships and taking initiative to deliver impactful results. My strong organizational and time management skills enable me to effectively handle various responsibilities. Additionally, I am passionate about continuous improvement and always strive to enhance processes and deliver exceptional outcomes.

Goals
I will continue to work on our company to better our services.
I am committed to my professional growth and to learn something new and of value to work efforts. I regularly look to improve our work processes in new and innovative ways.

Goals:

My primary goal is to contribute to the betterment of our company's services. I am dedicated to identifying areas for improvement and implementing strategies to enhance the quality of our work. Furthermore, I am committed to my professional growth and continuously seeking opportunities to expand my knowledge and skills. I actively seek out new and valuable learning experiences that can enhance my contributions to our work efforts. I am open to exploring innovative approaches and consistently strive to improve our work processes, ensuring efficiency and effectiveness in everything we do.

While we will touch on past performance for examples, the focus should be on the future.  How can the company help you make your job easier or more efficient?  Where are opportunities for growth?  What works and what doesn’t work?  I think it is important that we all strive to be better and so this will be the theme of our discussion.  How to answer above during my performance review. Right now, we are in process learning new software, and identify better workflow, by end of year, we will transfer old software QuickBooks to new software NetSuite. new software, new procedure, make sure get better and issue accuracy financial reports. improve efficient .. etc

During my performance review, I will focus on the future and discuss how the company can support me in making my job easier and more efficient. I will highlight the opportunities for growth and improvement, emphasizing the theme of striving to be better.

Firstly, I will mention the ongoing process of learning new software and identifying better workflows. This demonstrates my commitment to embracing new technologies and finding ways to streamline our processes. I will discuss how this transition to NetSuite from QuickBooks by the end of the year opens up opportunities for increased efficiency and more accurate financial reporting.

Additionally, I will highlight the importance of open communication and collaboration within the team. I will address areas that currently work well and provide examples of successful practices that contribute to our collective success. I will also address any areas where improvements can be made, emphasizing the need for continuous improvement and the willingness to adapt to new procedures.

Overall, I intend to showcase my dedication to maximizing efficiency, improving accuracy, and driving positive change within our organization. By highlighting the opportunities for growth and improvement, I will contribute to the ongoing success and progress of our team.
How can the company help you make your job easier or more efficient? Where are opportunities for growth? -How to answer?

When addressing how the company can help make your job easier or more efficient, it's important to provide specific suggestions and examples. Here's a possible response:

I believe there are several ways in which the company can support me in making my job easier and more efficient. One area of opportunity is through the provision of additional training and professional development resources. By investing in continued education and skills enhancement, I can stay updated on industry best practices and leverage new techniques or technologies to streamline processes.

Furthermore, access to efficient and reliable tools and software can significantly improve workflow efficiency. For instance, providing advanced project management software or automating repetitive tasks through the implementation of appropriate software systems can eliminate manual work and increase productivity.

Creating a culture of open communication and collaboration is also essential. Encouraging regular feedback and constructive discussions with supervisors and colleagues can identify bottlenecks or areas for improvement. Additionally, fostering cross-functional collaboration and knowledge sharing can lead to innovative ideas and process improvements.

Recognizing and rewarding employee achievements and contributions can also motivate and boost productivity. By acknowledging and celebrating successes, employees are inspired to excel and consistently provide high-quality work.

Overall, I believe that by investing in training, adopting efficient tools and technologies, encouraging collaboration, and providing recognition for accomplishments, the company can help make my job more manageable and efficient. These improvements will not only benefit me personally but also contribute to the overall success and growth of the organization.

Some challenge: I am so excited that we will put the new software, which can improve our accuracy and efficiency, such as create invoices. but as the same time, I am so worry about the transition, as we used to old software, after we transfer the data to new software, so many things need planned well -clearing old data, speaciall we have different entities, each entity set up customers/vendeors in differnt way. we need combine all together and delete duplicated ones, make corrections. also. we have to make sure the new software works good. make sure all the reports are right ...

It is completely understandable to feel a mix of excitement and worry during a software transition. In addressing these challenges during your performance review, you can demonstrate your proactive approach and commitment to ensuring a successful transition. Here's a possible response:

I share your excitement about the implementation of the new software and the potential improvements it will bring to our accuracy and efficiency, particularly in areas like invoice creation. However, I also acknowledge the challenges that come with this transition. I understand the importance of planning and managing the process effectively to mitigate any potential issues.

To address the concerns around data transfer, I believe careful planning is crucial. Collaborating with the IT team or experts on data migration can help ensure that all necessary steps are taken to clear old data, consolidate customer and vendor information, and address any duplications or corrections. By closely reviewing the data and thoroughly testing the new software, we can work together to minimize any errors or discrepancies.

In terms of making sure the new software works well, I propose investing time and resources in extensive testing and training. This will help familiarize ourselves with the new system and identify and address any potential problems or glitches early on. By actively participating in training sessions and providing valuable feedback, we can contribute to refining the software and creating a stable and reliable platform for accurate reporting.

Throughout this process, maintaining open lines of communication and collaboration among team members will be vital. Sharing concerns, best practices, and lessons learned will enhance our collective understanding and ensure a smoother transition.

By acknowledging these challenges and demonstrating your dedication to careful planning, problem-solving, and effective communication, you are highlighting your proactive mindset and commitment to overcoming obstacles. This reflects positively on your performance and shows your willingness to adapt and contribute to the success of the company during this transition.
change new software is a big investment, big challenge. but it is good run for our company. long term and embrace new technology.

I completely agree with you that implementing new software is a significant investment and can present challenges. However, I believe it is an important step for the long-term success and growth of our company. Embracing new technology allows us to stay competitive in our industry and adapt to ever-evolving market demands.

While the transition may bring certain complexities, it also opens up opportunities for process improvement, increased accuracy, and enhanced efficiency. It demonstrates our commitment to continuous improvement and our proactive approach to staying ahead in the industry.

By investing in the right software solutions and providing the necessary resources and support, we can overcome any initial challenges and reap the long-term benefits. It is an important milestone in our company's journey towards embracing new technology and leveraging its full potential.

I am confident that with proper planning, effective training, and ongoing communication, we can successfully navigate this transition and create a more streamlined, efficient, and productive work environment for the entire team. Together, we can embrace this change and seize the opportunities it presents for our company's long-term growth and success.
In the new software, we can build customized analysis reports, instead of excel. also, challenge is do we have enough history date to do comparison?

Absolutely, one of the advantages of the new software is the ability to generate customized analysis reports, which can provide more accurate and insightful data compared to manual Excel processes. This enables us to access real-time information and gain valuable insights into our business operations.

When it comes to historical data for comparison, it is indeed a challenge if we don't have enough data available in the new software initially. However, it is important to consider the long-term benefits and the opportunities that the new software brings. While we may not have an extensive history in the beginning, over time we will accumulate data and be able to perform more comprehensive and meaningful comparisons.

To address this challenge, we can explore options such as importing historical data from the old software or maintaining access to the old system for reference purposes. This will allow us to bridge the gap and ensure we have the necessary data for analysis and comparison. Additionally, we can develop strategies to capture and store relevant historical data moving forward to ensure we have a comprehensive data set for future analysis.

By proactively addressing the challenge of historical data and leveraging the capabilities of the new software, we can ultimately have a robust system in place for accurate and informed decision-making, driving our company's growth and success.

For the payroll process, IT mentioned that we can use excel upload instead of manual input. It will be great improvement -efficiency, accuracy. Just need to figure out how to do, how to fit our business, and with Union rules. need study and research etc.

Using an excel upload for the payroll process can indeed significantly improve efficiency and accuracy. It is a great opportunity to streamline our payroll operations. However, it is important to carefully assess how this change will fit our unique business requirements and consider any specific considerations related to union rules.

To ensure a successful implementation, I propose dedicating time to thoroughly study and research the excel upload process. This will involve analyzing our current payroll procedures, identifying areas that can benefit from automation, and understanding any necessary adjustments required to comply with union rules.

Collaborating with IT and other relevant stakeholders, we can work together to define the specific requirements and parameters for the excel upload process. By conducting thorough testing and piloting the new system, we can address any potential challenges or issues proactively.

Furthermore, I suggest creating training programs or resources to ensure that all relevant personnel are equipped with the necessary knowledge and skills to utilize the excel upload effectively and efficiently. This will promote a smooth transition and enable us to reap the full benefits of this improvement.

By embracing this opportunity for improvement, conducting careful research and analysis, and involving all stakeholders, we can successfully implement the excel upload process for payroll. This will enhance efficiency, accuracy, and compliance with union rules, contributing to the overall success of our payroll operations.

Another maybe improve area is our between companies deposit. Now when UCAS check deposits to UCGD account, in order to apply to invoices we created fake deposit cash ,the use JE to offset. which caused big cash transaction, it is hard to do bank reconciliation. Beacuse "Due to/from" is a liablity account, which can't apply  deposit. With our new software, we can try to fix it, or need move "other receivable asset account

Addressing the issue of between companies deposits is a valuable area for improvement. The current process of using fake cash deposits and journal entries can be time-consuming and complex, making bank reconciliation challenging. With the new software, we have an opportunity to address this issue and streamline the deposit application process.

One potential solution is to revise our account structure and consider moving the "Due to/from" liability account to an "other receivable asset account." By doing so, we can effectively match the deposit from UCAS to the invoices without resorting to the use of fake cash and journal entries. This adjustment would simplify the reconciliation process and ensure accurate and transparent financial reporting.

It is essential to thoroughly evaluate and test this proposed solution in collaboration with the finance and IT teams. We should also consider any potential implications and discuss the impact with our auditors to ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations.

By implementing this improvement, we can streamline our between companies deposit process, simplify reconciliation procedures, and enhance accuracy in financial reporting. This would further contribute to the efficiency and effectiveness of our financial operations.
very good!
Thank you! I'm glad I could provide helpful suggestions. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask. Best of luck with your performance review!
